narrative:
Moulton Township has 1,302 registered voters, with 48.9% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 44.8% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 6.3%, a pronounced Republican lean of 38.5 percentage points.
